home.heroDesc: Your top-tier, customer-centric partner for global and local communication via satellite and fiber optics. Reliable connectivity that scales with your ambitions.
home.offerDesc: Advanced telecom, cybersecurity, training, and hardware solutions — trusted since 2007 in Iraq.
home.telecomDesc: FTTH network design & deployment, satellite communications, P2P & P2MP wireless links, fiber optic maintenance (OTDR, splicing), structured cabling, and enterprise networking using Cisco, HPE Aruba, Dell & more.
home.cyberDesc: SIEM/SOC monitoring, endpoint protection, PAM/IAM, DLP, vulnerability management, and 24/7 managed security services.
home.partnersSubtitle: Global brands we proudly work with

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The story behind AFAQ ALFIKER
about.p1: AFAQ ALFIKER COMPANY was established in 2007 in Holy Karbala, Iraq, by a distinguished group of highly qualified and experienced engineers specializing in telecommunications and information technology.
about.p2: Since its inception, the company has set a strategic objective to deliver integrated and reliable communication solutions, and to contribute to building advanced infrastructure that keeps pace with the rapid technological evolution in telecommunications and internet sectors.
about.vision: To become a trusted regional leader in telecommunications and digital infrastructure solutions by delivering high-quality services aligned with the latest international standards, empowering communities and businesses through advanced technologies that accelerate digital transformation and promote sustainable development.
about.mission: At AFAQ ALFIKER COMPANY, we strive to deliver advanced telecommunications and IT solutions that contribute to building strong and secure digital infrastructure capable of meeting present demands and future challenges. We are committed to providing high-quality services driven by innovation and operational excellence, while continuously developing our team to ensure the delivery of the best technical solutions.
about.partnersSubtitle: Trusted global brands we work with

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Telecom, cybersecurity, training, and hardware — all under one roof
services.portfolioSubtitle: From fiber optic infrastructure to certified cybersecurity training, we deliver end-to-end solutions.
services.telecomDesc: FTTH network design & deployment, satellite communications, P2P & P2MP wireless links, fiber optic maintenance (OTDR, splicing), structured cabling, and enterprise networking using Cisco, HPE Aruba, Dell & more.
services.cyberDesc: End-to-end cybersecurity: SIEM/XDR/SOC monitoring, PAM/IAM, DLP & data classification, EDR endpoint protection, vulnerability management, threat intelligence, dark web monitoring, GRC, and secure email gateways.
services.trainingDesc: Professional training in partnership with ISC2, ISACA, EC-Council, PECB, BSI, CompTIA, and CertNexus. Programs cover cybersecurity, networking, governance, and advanced technology — online, in-person & corporate.
services.hardwareDesc: Full range of IT hardware: desktops, laptops, servers, storage systems, monitors, printers, UPS systems, GPUs, RAM, SSDs, motherboards, cooling systems, and complete data center setup & migration services.

projects.title: Our Portfolio
projects.subtitle: Global implementations built on precision and trust
projects.sectionSubtitle: Real projects delivered across Iraq for telecom operators, hospitals, hotels, and government entities.
projects.clickHint: Click any project to view details
projects.p1desc: Open-cut fiber optic cable laying and splicing across 1,750 km for major telecom operators.
projects.p1details: Large-scale fiber optic infrastructure project involving open-cut cable laying, splicing, and full commissioning across 1,750 km. The project served as backbone connectivity for Iraq's leading telecom operators, enabling reliable high-speed internet across multiple governorates.
projects.p1scope: Cable laying, fiber splicing, OTDR testing, full commissioning
projects.p1tech: Single-mode fiber, OTDR, fusion splicing equipment, open-cut trenching
projects.p2desc: Fiber optic infrastructure deployment using micro-trenching technology across 400 km of urban terrain.
projects.p2details: Urban fiber optic deployment using advanced micro-trenching technology, minimizing disruption to city infrastructure while achieving 400 km of high-quality fiber coverage. This project demonstrated our capability in densely populated environments where traditional open-cut methods are impractical.
projects.p2scope: Micro-trench excavation, fiber laying, splicing, restoration
projects.p2tech: Micro-trenching machines, single-mode fiber, micro-duct systems
projects.p3desc: Fiber-to-the-home projects across four Iraqi governorates using micro-trench and directional boring techniques.
projects.p3details: Comprehensive FTTH rollout across four strategic Iraqi governorates — Karbala, Najaf, Babylon, and Basra. The project utilized both micro-trenching and horizontal directional drilling (HDD) techniques, covering last-mile connectivity from central offices to individual homes, including main source connection, splicing, and full commissioning.
projects.p3scope: Last-mile FTTH deployment, HDD, micro-trench, OLT/ONT installation, commissioning
projects.p3tech: GPON, OLT/ONT, HDD equipment, micro-duct, fusion splicing
projects.p4desc: Design and deployment of wireless internet network covering all districts and sub-districts of Karbala and part of Kirkuk.
projects.p4details: End-to-end design and deployment of a wide-area wireless internet network spanning all districts and sub-districts of Karbala Governorate, plus selected areas of Kirkuk. The network uses a combination of P2P and P2MP point-to-point and multipoint links, with redundant backbone connectivity ensuring high availability.
projects.p4scope: Network design, tower installation, P2P/P2MP links, backhaul, NOC setup
projects.p4tech: MikroTik, Ubiquiti, Cambium, P2P/P2MP wireless, VHF/UHF
projects.p5desc: Full ICT infrastructure deployment for Al-Hussein Teaching Hospital, including structured cabling, networking, and technical support systems.
projects.p5details: Complete ICT infrastructure overhaul for one of Iraq's major teaching hospitals. The project encompassed structured cabling (Cat6A), enterprise LAN/WAN networking, IP telephony, server room setup, access control, CCTV, and ongoing 24/7 technical support — ensuring uninterrupted operations across all hospital departments.
projects.p5scope: Structured cabling, enterprise networking, IP telephony, server room, CCTV, access control
projects.p5tech: Cisco, HPE, Cat6A cabling, IP PBX, NVR/CCTV, UPS systems
projects.p6desc: Enterprise network and IT infrastructure setup for Crystal Hotels Group across all hotel branches.
projects.p6details: Full enterprise IT and network infrastructure deployment for Crystal Hotels Group, covering all hotel branches. Services included structured cabling, managed Wi-Fi, VLAN segmentation for guest and staff networks, centralized firewall and security, IP surveillance, and IT hardware supply — delivering a seamless and secure experience for guests and staff alike.
projects.p6scope: Structured cabling, managed Wi-Fi, VLAN, firewall, CCTV, IT hardware supply
projects.p6tech: Cisco, Fortinet, Ubiquiti Wi-Fi, Cat6A, NVR/IP cameras, UPS
